title: Why Do People Have Botox & Dermal Filler Treatments？ | Dr Tim's Tips
filename: Why Do People Have Botox & Dermal Filler Treatments？ ｜ Dr Tim_s Tips.en.vtt
excerpt: Why do people get Botox and dermal fillers I could answer that in a really superficial way which is because they want to look prettier better-looking or and get really deep and I love going into the depths of human psychology and trying to explain human behavior it's one of my fa…

segments.text: why do people get Botox and dermal fillers I could answer that in a really superficial way which is because they want to look prettier better-looking or and get really deep and I love going into the depths of human psychology and trying to explain human behavior it's one of my favorite things to ponder so I had to ask myself this question when I first started in aesthetic medicine because and I don't want to do something superficial and pointless with my life and I wanted to be meaningful in some way and that got me thinking around what is driving people to have these treatments and actually one of the one of my first clients was 92 that was one of the big surprises for me starting in this industry and it really shook up some of my preconceptions about why it is that people have these treatments because obviously I knew I could not make her look significantly younger and so what was interesting is the backstory so she was concerned that a negative expression would stop people from approaching her when she was out and

about in a daily life her desire was to free what she saw as an obstacle so that people would connect with her more while she was out and about and that really woke me up to why it is that people have aesthetic treatment and that's not for everyone but essentially I see your appearance as a tool of connection and it's not necessarily that people it's an outside-in always it can be that people are more likely in fact this is true people are more likely to approach you if you look a certain way if you look non-threatening like not grumpy for example which is what this lady understood but also is about how you feel you do you feel confident to approach other people and that's ultimately what appearance is about it's one of the tools we use to connect with each other and we are constantly scanning people around us and looking for people to spend our time with that will maximize our survival I actually think our appearance is a survival tool and most people who are focusing on maintaining their appearance and they understand this on a different level and they are working towards maximizing their survival through increasing opportunity through

increasing opportunity through increasing their attractiveness and beauty and this is why it matters so much what we look like and we may not like that idea but we are part of nature it is the same with animals they make judgments according to which animal looks healthy in fact in extreme cases animals will Peck to death an animal that isn't healthy and we do something unfortunately fairly similar in our culture which is we do invest more resources and it makes sense if you think about it why would you not reinvest more of resources in the young and the healthy why would you not give them more attention because they are the future and ultimately that means for the individual you can maximize your productivity by maintaining your appearance and your sense of health and beauty for as long as possible and that is ultimately what I think the instinct is that drives us to be concerned about her behavior now I don't think that's how people explain it themselves most people will and will just say oh I just feel better I look nice I like to maintain myself but there's a little bit like hunger is to nutrition we don't eat because we want nutrition we because we

feel hungry and then we feel better when we've eaten it's a lot like that with maintaining your appearance you feel better but the unconscious drive is about survival it's about the fact that we understand intuitively that how we look will affect our chances with other people it affects the opportunities that you have the relationships that you can build and as sad as that might be if you for the people who don't achieve what they want do that's just nature and really what and Botox and dermal fillers are doing their part of a wide repertoire interventions that people make to maximize their chance of survival through the medium of their appearance you
